display.purpose: Page titles — the single largest label on a screen (Source Serif 4 700).

title.purpose: Card titles and panel headers (Source Serif 4 700).

metric.purpose: Large numeric readouts — GPA, counts — in the serif's tabular lining figures (Source Serif 4 700, tabular-nums).

label.purpose: Sparing uppercase red micro-tag, one per section (Source Sans 3 700, 0.08em).

shadows.name: clay
shadows.purpose: Default resting elevation for cards and panels.

shadows.name: clay-sm
shadows.purpose: Flatter lift for buttons, chips, inputs, muted cards.

shadows.name: clay-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover lift, paired with a border-strong darken.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Soft Canvas-red glow ring on input/composer focus.

motion.name: transition-ui
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (background, border, shadow, color).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid Canvas-red call to action for the single most important action on a view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px solid #a82b1f; background: #e03e26; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(168 43 31 / 0.25); transition: background 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c93424; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e03e26; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.08); transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Red-outlined action for secondary emphasis on a light surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px solid #e03e26; background: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e03e26; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.05), 0 2px 8px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.05); transition: background 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #fdecea; border-color: #c93424; color: #c93424; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e03e26; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Quiet neutral-bordered action — the default low-emphasis button on light surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px solid #c7d1db; background: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2d3b45; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.05), 0 2px 8px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.05); transition: background 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #8b9aab; background: #e8eef4; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e03e26; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Toggleable filter pill; active state washes soft-red with a red border.
components.css: .ds-chip { cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px solid #c7d1db; background: #fff; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2d3b45; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out, background 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #8b9aab; background: #e8eef4; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e03e26; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip--active { border-color: #e03e26; background: #fdecea; color: #a82b1f; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Recessed field with a red focus ring matching the global focus language.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; cursor: text; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px solid #c7d1db; background: #fff; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #2d3b45; outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.04); transition: border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5c6b7a; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #e03e26; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.04), 0 0 0 3px rgb(224 62 38 / 0.18); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default white surface with 2px border and resting clay shadow; interactive variant lifts on hover.
components.html:
Current grade

Biology 101

A− · 91.4% · 2 assignments due this week
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 2px solid #c7d1db; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.06), 0 4px 14px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.07); padding: 1.5rem; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #8b9aab; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.07), 0 8px 20px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.09); } .ds-section-label { display: block; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #e03e26; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0.35rem 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: #2d3b45; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5c6b7a; }

components.name: Global Nav Bar
components.description: Solid dark-slate bar with a 3px Canvas-red underline — no glass, no blur.
components.html:
CanvasBuddy
HomeGradesUpcoming
components.css: .ds-nav { border-bottom: 3px solid #e03e26; background: #2d3b45; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgb(45 59 69 / 0.15); } .ds-nav-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; max-width: 72rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0.875rem 1.25rem; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: #fff; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-link { cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #aeb5bb; transition: background 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.08); color: #fff; } .ds-nav-link--active { background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12); color: #fff; }

components.name: Chat Send Button
components.description: Circular Canvas-red send control inside the AI composer pill.
components.html: <button class="ds-chat-send" aria-label="Send"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 2 11 13"/><path d="M22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-chat-send { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; flex-shrink: 0; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #e03e26; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, opacity 200ms ease-out; } .ds-chat-send:hover { background: #c93424; } .ds-chat-send:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e03e26; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chat-send:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

narrative.overview: CanvasBuddy presents a student's grades, deadlines, and missing work the way a trustworthy ledger does: calmly, exactly, and without editorializing. The surface gets out of the way so the numbers carry the meaning. It borrows Canvas's signature red so students feel continuity with the system it reads from, but it is deliberately lighter, faster, and less cluttered than Canvas itself. The palette is a cool slate-and-paper neutral field with Canvas red reserved almost entirely for action and emphasis; type pairs a scholarly serif (Source Serif 4 headings and large metric figures) against a clean humanist sans (Source Sans 3 body and UI), contrasting on silhouette for ledger-like credibility. Depth is a soft two-layer clay shadow paired with a 2px border — tactile, never plastic. It reads as a credible academic tool a student trusts with their GPA.
keyCharacteristics: Cool slate-and-paper neutral field; Canvas red strictly for action and emphasis.
Scholarly serif headings (Source Serif 4) against a clean humanist sans body (Source Sans 3).
Soft two-layer clay shadows + 2px borders — grounded, never plastic.
Calm by default; stakes surfaced honestly, never alarmingly.
Standard, familiar product affordances — the tool disappears into the task.

rules.name: The Scalpel Rule
rules.body: Canvas red is for action and genuine stakes only — primary actions, the current selection, focus, and real danger. It is never decoration and never a section divider. If a screen is more than ~10% red, pull it back to neutral.

rules.name: The Native-Link Rule
rules.body: Links are Canvas Blue, never red. Red is 'do something'; blue is 'go somewhere.' Never swap them.

rules.name: The Serif-Heads, Sans-Reads Rule
rules.body: Source Serif 4 owns headings, titles, and large metric figures; Source Sans 3 owns body, labels, buttons, and dense UI. Never set running body text in the serif or a page title in the sans — the silhouette swap is the hierarchy.

rules.name: The One Red Label Rule
rules.body: The uppercase red section label is a deliberate, sparing tag — at most one per logical section. Do not scatter it as a decorative eyebrow.

rules.name: The Border-Carries-Structure Rule
rules.body: Every elevated surface gets a 2px border and a clay shadow — never a shadow alone. A borderless floating card looks unfinished on the cool paper field.

rules.name: The Depth-Is-Feedback Rule
rules.body: Resting elevation is quiet and uniform. Reserve the change in depth (hover lift, pressed inset) for interaction, so motion in the shadow always means 'you touched something.'

dos: Do keep Canvas red for action and genuine stakes only — aim for ≤10% red coverage on any screen.
Do use Canvas Blue for links and Canvas Red for actions — never swap them.
Do pair every elevated surface with a 2px border and a clay shadow; let the border carry structure.
Do set headings, titles, and large metric figures in Source Serif 4, and all body/labels/UI in Source Sans 3 — the serif/sans silhouette swap is the hierarchy.
Do reserve depth changes (hover lift, pressed inset) for interaction, and keep transitions 150–250ms ease-out.
Do verify ink-muted (#5c6b7a) hits ≥4.5:1 wherever it carries body text or placeholders; pair color with text/icon for state.
Do give every interactive element cursor: pointer and a visible red :focus-visible ring.
donts: Don't reproduce Canvas LMS's cluttered, institutional density — read lighter and answer 'where do I stand?' faster.
Don't drift toward cold enterprise SaaS — generic navy-and-gray dashboards, soulless data tables, corporate chrome.
Don't add anything childish, gamified, or game-like — no confetti, mascots, cartoon badges, or playful display fonts.
Don't build anxiety theater — walls of red alerts or guilt-driven nagging. Red is a scalpel, not a fire alarm.
Don't float a borderless card or use a shadow without its 2px border — it looks unfinished on the paper field.
Don't scatter the uppercase red section label as a decorative eyebrow; at most one per logical section.
Don't use glassmorphism/backdrop-blur in the nav or cards, gradient text, or border-left colored stripes as accents.
